_readme: DAVID OWNS THIS FILE — per-metric market-position classification (handover Part A).
FIREWALL: class/direction/competitiveness drive COMPUTED positions. Hot-reload: edit and the engine picks it up; no rebuild, no gate (pre-launch).
Per-metric: class (Level|Provision|Practice|Design), type (numeric|binary|ordinal|categorical), direction (higher_is_better|lower_is_better|neutral|null for Approach), lens, weight (reserved v2).
Only higher_is_better Substance (Level/Provision) in a competitiveness domain feeds the gauge. lower_is_better=favourable, neutral=context — shown beside it. Approach (Practice/Design)=differs.
Review the flagged subset in MARKET_POSITION_REVIEW.md (Part B). Priority of harm: direction > competitiveness > class > lens.

directions.text: What was the overall salary increase budget (merit/annual review) as a percentage of payro
directions.why: neutral — U-shaped / cost / count: context, not a verdict

directions.text: What was total workforce cost per FTE in the last completed financial year (in GBP)?
directions.why: neutral — U-shaped / cost / count: context, not a verdict

directions.text: What was total workforce cost as a percentage of revenue in the last completed financial y
directions.why: neutral — U-shaped / cost / count: context, not a verdict

directions.text: In the last 12 months, have you enhanced benefits in response to cost-of-living or labour
Do employees receive customer tips or service charges as part of their total earnings?
Are malus provisions used (reduce unpaid awards) for misconduct/risk/compliance issues?
Are clawback provisions used (recover paid awards) in defined circumstances?
Does your organisation operate any long-term incentive or equity plans for any levels?
Does your organisation operate sales commission or commission-based incentive plans?
What was the average redundancy cost per employee in the last completed 12-month period?
directions.why: neutral — U-shaped / cost / count: context, not a verdict

directions.text: Employer pension cost as a % of total reward spend?
directions.why: neutral — U-shaped / cost / count: context, not a verdict

directions.text: What life assurance cover is provided for the main population (multiple of salary)?
What is the standard premium for working on UK bank holidays where applicable?
Do any pay premiums or discounts apply specifically to remote roles?
Do you operate a long service award scheme?

Is there a formal policy describing pay progression within bands?
Does your organisation run disability pay gap analyses (or pay equity analyses by disabili
Which pillars are explicitly included in your total rewards strategy?
Which best describes how promotion decisions are governed?

When was your total rewards strategy last refreshed or formally reviewed?
Is there a standard minimum time-in-role or time-in-grade expectation before promotion (wh
Approximately what proportion of employees receive an off-cycle pay increase outside the a
Do you monitor promotion rates by protected characteristics to identify equity issues?
Do you have a published equality action plan, and which characteristics does it cover?
Do you use AI tools in pay decisions, and with what governance?
Do you run proactive equal-pay audits, and how often?
Can you group your workforce into categories of equal value (by skills, effort, responsibi
Do you include pay or a pay range in job adverts?
Have you removed salary-history questions from your hiring process?
How prepared are you for the EU Pay Transparency Directive (2026)?
Does your organisation conduct gender pay gap analysis at least annually?
Are pay decisions reviewed for fairness before implementation (e.g., calibration, central
Are exceptions to standard pay rules formally documented with justification?
Does your organisation review pay outcomes for compression and internal equity as part of
Does your organisation review incentive outcomes by protected characteristic (where data i
Does your organisation have a documented pay transparency approach or policy?
Do employees have access to pay ranges for their grade/role family?
Does your organisation publish pay ranges on job adverts?
Over the next 12-24 months, do you plan to expand external pay transparency?
Have you completed a pay transparency readiness assessment (e.g., audit of structures, dat
Are formal pay ranges defined for all permanent roles?
Are pay ranges linked to a documented job evaluation or grading framework?
How often are pay ranges reviewed and refreshed using market data?
Does your organisation use external pay benchmark data when setting pay ranges or offers?
Are allowances consolidated into base pay at any point (e.g., on promotion or contract cha
Is progression eligibility linked to performance outcomes?
Does your organisation use promotion guidelines that specify recommended salary positionin
What is pay progression based on outside of the annual review and promotions?
What is the typical maximum pay increase for promotions?
